codeReview.summary: Pass. I reviewed the feature metadata, worker handoff, transcript skeleton, commit `5274199`, and the resulting overlay implementation. The feature satisfies VAL-TELE-001 through VAL-TELE-005: `TeleprompterView` keeps the viewport pinned at `(0,0)` with settings-driven dimensions and mount-time `set_overlay_rect` sync, `ReadingLine` stays viewport-scoped and `aria-hidden`, the HUD shows the correct Rolling/Standby state with `RecDot` plus speed and script name, hidden mode removes HUD chips while the root fades to `opacity: 0`, and the touched teleprompter glass/shadow styling was moved onto token-backed variables with matching manifest coverage in `src/ui/tokens.ts`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `frontend-redesign` skill procedure and the handoff's `followedProcedure` reporting are out of sync for this overlay feature. The skill requires invoking `frontend-design` at session start and reading `.factory/library/architecture.md`, but this transcript skeleton shows neither, while the handoff still reports `followedProcedure: true`.

summary: Pass. Commit `5274199` completes the teleprompter viewport / reading-line / HUD polish work and adds the expected HUD and hidden-state coverage; I found no blocking correctness or regression issues in the reviewed feature.
